rationale: The citing paper references Hedgcock and Rao (2009) mainly as an illustrative prior consumer-neuroscience finding, noting decoy-related amygdala results. It is used to frame the broader contrast between localization-based "where" studies and the authors' "what" decoding approach, including a general reverse-inference caveat. The cited study is not used as a direct basis for hypotheses, measurement choices, model construction, or empirical tests in this paper.
